revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Fujiwara no Seishi]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Fujiwara no Seishi]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:藤原娍子, en:Fujiwara no Seishi); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fujiwara_no_Seishi here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fujiwara_no_Seishi for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{talk page header}}

<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers -->
<!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->

== Local discussion ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:27, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->

== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/78286048 revision]) ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:27, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
<!-- Source: ja:Talk:藤原娍子 | revid=78286048 -->
== 改名提案 ==
[[Wikipedia:記事名の付け方]]による漢字の使用制限が緩和されましたので、「[[藤原娍子]]」への改名を提案します。--[[User:こんせ|こんせ]]（[[利用者‐会話:こんせ|会話]]） 2020年6月26日 (金) 13:05 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:27, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:27, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
